themes.title: Domain Concentration Pattern
themes.description: Applicant's academic profile shows concentration of 14 entries in science and mathematics domains.

questions: How did your interest in science and mathematics develop over time?
Can you walk through one project or activity that demonstrates your concentration in these domains?
